required_preferences.fact: Cleans his apartment on Saturday mornings or whenever his father is scheduled to visit—flexibly moving chores to ensure the space is ready for company

supersedes.fact: Cleans his apartment Friday evenings to mark the transition to weekend—never leaves chores for Sunday nights

required_preferences.fact: Pauses personal training for upper body workouts and instead books guided lower body or cardio-focused sessions every Friday—switches to walking, cycling, or trainer-led stretching for accountability during recovery

supersedes.fact: Books a personal training session every Friday morning to stay accountable—never skips workouts two weeks in a row

required_preferences.fact: Watches one live sports game (in person or on TV) every weekend—never misses a Dallas Mavericks home game on TV
Uses digital flashcard apps nightly to memorize merger-specific sales scripts and software functions—prefers solo study over group calls except for scheduled exam prep sessions
Wears blue-light blocking glasses after 9pm when using screens—never answers emails in bed to reduce sleep disruption
Reads nutrition labels for all new grocery purchases—never buys packaged foods without checking cholesterol content

persona: A recent MBA graduate working in business development for a logistics firm
